citations.description: Ticket deps field is empty ([]) and managed_refs only contains the parent epic back-reference; no child task IDs are enumerated as deps

findings.detail: The parent story ticket 297d-a233-ce1b-4484 has status 'in_progress', not closed. The seven child tasks enumerated in the 'What' section (Bootstrap Bot identity, Local dev, AWS review-bot+auto-lander, GHA reconcile-bridge code fix, GHA reconcile-bridge-canary, Test remediation, CI verify-identity mount) are referenced by short IDs in the codebase (9e76, 245e, 1787, 472f, cc0b, ad42, bffe) that cannot be resolved as full ticket IDs in the ticket system — none are confirmable as closed. The story itself remaining 'in_progress' is direct evidence this criterion is not met.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
